name: Bordelaise Sauce- Master Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a medium saucepan.
2. Add the shallots and garlic; cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the bouquet garni and wine; bring to a boil.
4. In a mixing bowl, mash together marrow and flour with a fork until nearly smooth.
5. Whisk the mixture into the wine; bring to a boil gently, whisking occasionally, until reduced by half.
6. Gradually add veal stock and simmer gently until thickened enough to coat a spoon lightly.
